name: Hot Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cocoa with half a cup of milk.
2. Stir in the remaining milk.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Add salt, vanilla (to taste, optional), and artificial sweetener.
Note: 1 serving contains 95 calories, 9.1 gm protein, .9 gm fat, 14.1 gm carbohydrate, 126 mg sodium (excluding pinch of salt), 467.5 mg potassium, .2 gm fiber, and 4 mg cholesterol.
